title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at Paytm Money
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
